name: logistics-fullstack
description: Hệ thống Quản lý Logistics & Chuỗi Cung Ứng — BTL Cơ sở Dữ liệu

scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
